title: equisetum × moorei
intro: Equisetum × moorei, also known as the horse tail fern or giant horse tail, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Equisetum, a type of vascular plant that reproduces via spores rather than seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Equisetum × moorei include reducing inflammation and improving circulation, as well as supporting the immune system. Equisetum × moorei can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis and skin conditions.
